Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Class
    Description
    OutputStreamSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for byte-based serializers.
    OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<SELF extends OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    OutputStreamSerializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed OutputStreamSerializer.create() / Serializer.copy() path.
    OutputStreamSerializerSession
    Subclass of SerializerSession for stream-based serializers.
    OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    OutputStreamSerializerSession.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
    SerializeException
    General exception thrown whenever an error occurs during serialization.
    Serializer
    Parent class for all Juneau serializers.
    Serializer.Builder<SELF extends Serializer.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    Serializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed Serializer.create() / Serializer.copy() path.
    Serializer.Null
    Represents no Serializer.
    SerializerConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in Serializer, OutputStreamSerializer, and WriterSerializer.
    SerializerConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @SerializerConfig annotation.
    SerializerConfigAnnotation.OutputStreamSerializerApply
    Applies SerializerConfig annotations to a OutputStreamSerializer.Builder.
    SerializerConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
    Applies SerializerConfig annotations to a Serializer.Builder.
    SerializerConfigAnnotation.WriterSerializerApply
    Applies SerializerConfig annotations to a WriterSerializer.Builder.
    SerializerListener
    Class for listening for serialize events during a serialization.
    SerializerListener.Void
    Represents no serializer listener.
    SerializerMatch
    Represents a serializer and media type that matches an HTTP Accept header value.
    SerializerPipe
    A wrapper around an object that a serializer sends its output to.
    SerializerSession
    Serializer session that lives for the duration of a single use of Serializer.
    SerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends SerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    SerializerSession.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
    SerializerSet
    Represents a group of Serializers that can be looked up by media type.
    SerializerSet.Builder
    Builder class.
    SerializerSet.Inherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should be inherited.
    SerializerSet.NoInherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should not be inherited.
    SerializerWriter
    Simple wrapper around a standard Writer with additional methods.
    WriterSerializer
    Subclass of Serializer for character-based serializers.
    WriterSerializer.Builder<SELF extends WriterSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    WriterSerializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed WriterSerializer.create() / WriterSerializer.copy() path.
    WriterSerializerSession
    Subclass of SerializerSession for character-based serializers.
    WriterSerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    WriterSerializerSession.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
